data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Amazon's architecture is built on a microservices model to enhance scalability and flexibility.
data.technical_spec: AWS cloud-based infrastructure, using services like ECS, Lambda, and API Gateway.

data.title: Serverless Computing
data.description: Utilizes serverless technologies for on-demand resource allocation.
data.technical_spec: AWS Lambda, S3, and DynamoDB for data storage and processing.

data.title: Load Balancers
data.description: Employs load balancers to accommodate high traffic and ensure availability.
data.technical_spec: AWS ELB (Elastic Load Balancing) for distributing traffic across instances.

data.title: Data-Driven Architecture
data.description: Empowers decisions with data pipelines and real-time analytics.
data.technical_spec: AWS Kinesis, Redshift, and RDS for data handling.

data.title: Global CDN
data.description: Global content delivery strategy to improve load times globally.
data.technical_spec: Amazon CloudFront for content caching and delivery.
